title: Nominal cooling capacity options
summary: Each unit module has nominal cooling capacities of 65kW, 80kW, or 130kW.
evidence_quote: 每个单元模块的名义制冷量不同，有 65kW，80kW 和 130kW 可选。

title: Maximum number of combined modules
summary: Up to 8 modules can be combined, providing a total cooling capacity range of 65–1040 kW.
evidence_quote: 通过组合 1～8 个相同或不同的单元模块，机组形成制冷量在 65～1040kW 范围的系列产品。

title: Minimum operating ambient temperature for heating
summary: The unit can operate stably in heating mode down to -15°C ambient temperature.
evidence_quote: 使机组可以在低至-15℃温度下稳定制热。

title: LSQWRF65M/B cooling capacity
summary: Cooling capacity of LSQWRF65M/B is 65 kW.

title: LSQWRF65M/B heating capacity
summary: Heating capacity of LSQWRF65M/B is 70 kW.

title: LSQWRF65M/B cooling power input
summary: Cooling power input of LSQWRF65M/B is 20.3 kW.

title: LSQWRF65M/B heating power input
summary: Heating power input of LSQWRF65M/B is 20.0 kW.

title: LSQWRF65M/B sound level
summary: Sound level of LSQWRF65M/B is 67 dB(A).

title: LSQWRF65M/B water flow rate
summary: Water flow rate of LSQWRF65M/B is 11.2 m³/h.

title: LSQWRF65M/B water pressure drop
summary: Water pressure drop of LSQWRF65M/B is 10 kPa.
